raw.objective: “To characterize the effects of lamotrigine on QT interval in healthy subjects”
raw.covariates: LMT concentration as a predictor for QT interval change
raw.observations: PK was not modelled, but actual concentrations were predictive of QT changes. The lack of reported parameter values and inadequate description of the model does not allow implementation of the model to, for example, run simulations
raw.structure: No PK; QT described as function of time and LMT concentration
raw.equations: CIRC=”a complex function that described the systematic variation in QT interval within the study day for an individual” QT=BL*((RR/1000)**a)*(1+(SLOPElmt*CONClmt)+(SLOPEmox*CONCmox))*(1+CIRC)+eps1 SLOPElmt=theta1 CONClmt=concentration of lamotrigine SLOPEmox=theta2 CONCmox=concentration of moxifloxacine RR=RR interval a= not specified

structural_model.description: No PK; QT described as function of time and LMT concentration

extraction_target.residual_error: CIRC=”a complex function that described the systematic variation in QT interval within the study day for an individual” QT=BL*((RR/1000)**a)*(1+(SLOPElmt*CONClmt)+(SLOPEmox*CONCmox))*(1+CIRC)+eps1 SLOPElmt=theta1 CONClmt=concentration of lamotrigine SLOPEmox=theta2 CONCmox=concentration of moxifloxacine RR=RR interval a= not specified
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “To characterize the effects of lamotrigine on QT interval in healthy subjects”

covariates.tested: LMT concentration as a predictor for QT interval change
covariates.raw: LMT concentration as a predictor for QT interval change

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
